{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Arelius Archlord
| introduced = cradle-12-waybound
}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|A heavily wounded [[Arelius Archlord]] bowed to [[Mercy]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c18">''Waybound'', chapter 18</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
